deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && gunicorn Plumbing_CRM.wsgi

crons.name: send-followups
crons.description: Check non-responsive leads ~every 7 min 8 AM – 9 PM CAT, offset so ticks never land on the hour (:03,:10,:17…); each lead fires at its own jittered minute for natural human send times

crons.name: send-reminders
crons.description: Customer and plumber reminders every 15 min — booking, morning, 2hr, 30min alerts
